html:
Exclusive to:

Potted Succulents are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They are found in the Decorations Filter, and require 2 Succulents and 1 Cut Stone to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Potted Succulents serve only decorative purposes, and there are five different varieties.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Bearger's Paw Succulent was distributed to everyone for free along with the Depths of Duplicity update.
  • The Loyal Clay-potted Succulent was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
Loyal
Bearger's Paw Succulent
How can one not love those tiny green paws?
Loyal
Clay-potted Succulent
How can one resist those playful orange blooms?

Trivia

  • The Potted Succulent was added in the Against the Grain update.

Assets

Potted SucculentBearger's Paw SucculentClay-potted Succulent

  • Build

  • Build
  • Placed

  • Build
  • Placed

Gallery

  • All variants of the Potted Succulent.

Potted Succulent
"A pretty succulent jammed in a pot."
Object Info
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×2 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"succulent_potted"
“A succulent in a pot.”
–Wilson
“We're keeping it.”
–Willow
“Tough plant is mine.”
–Wolfgang
“This gilded cage is ceramic.”
–Wendy
“MINIONS AGREE IT LOOKS BETTER IMPRISONED”
–WX-78
“I wonder how my garden is doing without me.”
–Wickerbottom
“Ain't a tree, but ain't bad.”
–Woodie
“You're hard to kill. I respect that.”
–Maxwell
“A feast för mine eyes!”
–Wigfrid
“I wonder if mum's ever seen one.”
–Webber
“I would have preferred to cook it, but c'est la vie.”
–Warly
“Found friend a home”
–Wormwood
“It's in a pot now.”
–Winona
“A plant, imprisoned for eternity.”
–Wortox
“Has a home now.”
–Wurt
“I guess it's nice. I prefer plants outdoors though.”
–Walter
“I can never seem to keep them alive for long.”
–Wanda
Potted Succulents are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They are found in the Decorations Filter, and require 2 Succulents and 1 Cut Stone to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Potted Succulents serve only decorative purposes, and there are five different varieties.

Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Bearger's Paw Succulent was distributed to everyone for free along with the Depths of Duplicity update.
The Loyal Clay-potted Succulent was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

I prefer plants outdoors though. |wanda = I can never seem to keep them alive for long. |choose = wx78}} '''Potted Succulents''' are craftable [[Structure]]s exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. They are found in the [[Decorations Filter]], and require 2 [[Succulent]]s and 1 [[Cut Stone]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Potted Succulents serve only decorative purposes, and there are five different varieties. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Potted_Succulent-0|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Bearger's Paw Succulent''' was distributed to everyone for free along with the [[Depths of Duplicity]] update. * The '''Loyal Clay-potted Succulent''' was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of [[Cursed Confrontation Part 1]] update.
